fixes.origin:
lookup_query = (
    f"SELECT id, subject FROM tickets "
    f"WHERE owner = '{owner_name}' "
    f"ORDER BY created_at DESC"
)

cursor.execute(lookup_query)
fixes.replacement:
lookup_query = (
    "SELECT id, subject FROM tickets "
    "WHERE owner = %s "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC"
)

cursor.execute(lookup_query, (owner_name,))
